description: A technician is performing a scheduled preventive maintenance task and needs to complete the associated checklist.

nodes.task_description: Open the maintenance work order to access the digital PM checklist.

expected_outcome.value: Agent opens the work order on their mobile device and sees the list of PM tasks.

nodes.task_description: Perform each task on the list (e.g., 'Check fluid levels', 'Lubricate bearings') and mark it as complete.

expected_outcome.value: Technician completes all physical tasks and checks them off in the system.

nodes.task_description: Sign off on the completed PM work order and log the time spent.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully closes the PM work order, and the asset's maintenance history is updated.
